changeSet.author: research-edc
changeSet.comment: Create guarded bidirectional sync between crf and module_crf
changeSet.rollback: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_sync_crf_to_module ON crf; DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS sync_crf_to_module_crf();

changeSet.author: research-edc
changeSet.comment: Create guarded bidirectional sync between crf_version and module_crf_version
changeSet.rollback: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_sync_crf_version_to_module ON crf_version; DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS sync_crf_version_to_module_crf_version();

changeSet.author: research-edc
changeSet.comment: Create guarded bidirectional sync between item and module_item
changeSet.rollback: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_sync_item_to_module ON item; DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS sync_item_to_module_item();

changeSet.author: research-edc
changeSet.comment: Create guarded bidirectional sync between item_form_metadata and module_item_form_metadata
changeSet.rollback: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_sync_item_form_metadata_to_module ON item_form_metadata; DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS sync_item_form_metadata_to_module_ifm();

changeSet.author: research-edc
changeSet.comment: Create guarded bidirectional sync between section and module_section
changeSet.rollback: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_sync_section_to_module ON section; DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS sync_section_to_module_section();
